a working state.

Milestone 1 – Project Foundation

* Repository initialization
* Monorepo structure
* Docker Compose
* GitHub Actions
* FastAPI backend
* Next.js frontend
* PostgreSQL
* Redis
* Environment configuration
* Health check endpoint

Milestone 2 – Authentication

* User registration
* Login
* JWT authentication
* Refresh tokens
* OAuth (Google/GitHub)
* Email verification
* Password reset
* Multi-factor authentication
* Role-based access control

Milestone 3 – Domain Marketplace

* Domain listings
* Categories
* Search
* Filters
* Favorites
* Offers
* Buy Now
* Seller profiles
* Reviews

Milestone 4 – AI

* AI domain generator
* AI domain valuation
* Brand name generator
* Logo generation
* Landing page generation
* SEO optimization
* Business description generation

Milestone 5 – Payments

* Paystack
* Flutterwave
* Stripe
* Cryptocurrency
* Escrow
* Invoice generation
* Refund management

Milestone 6 – Dashboard

* Analytics
* Sales reports
* Notifications
* Wallet
* API keys
* Activity logs
* Profile management

Milestone 7 – Admin

* User management
* Domain moderation
* Payment management
* Fraud detection
* AI moderation
* System configuration

Milestone 8 – Cloud

* DNS management
* SSL provisioning
* Website deployment
* Email hosting
* Object storage
* CDN integration

Milestone 9 – Blockchain

* Wallet integration
* Smart contracts
* Domain ownership certificates
* Escrow contracts
* NFT support (optional)
* Tokenized portfolios

Milestone 10 – Production

* Kubernetes
* Auto-scaling
* Monitoring
* Logging
* Metrics
* Automated backups
* Disaster recovery
* Security scanning
